payload.answer: In admin SQL select-only mode, read-only SELECT queries are permitted, specifically exemplified by "SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10". Destructive statements such as "DELETE FROM memory_cards" are denied.
citations: Input: "Admin SQL select-only mode - SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied"

entity_resolution.reason: The input describes a current debug/admin access constraint, not a durable personal fact to commit to memory.

details: Parsed the input as an access-policy/debug constraint.
Did not create memory cards because the content is operational and non-durable.
Preserved the exact allowed/denied distinction without inferring broader permissions.

repair_options: Use only SELECT statements while in select-only mode.
Avoid DELETE/UPDATE/INSERT/DDL statements in this mode.
If deletion is required, switch to a mode with write permissions after explicit authorization.
